Class ImportService

java.lang.Object
com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.ImportService
@Service public class ImportService extends Object
Service responsible for orchestrating the music file import process.

Runs imports on a dedicated single-threaded ExecutorService to ensure imports are sequential and never overlap, preventing duplicate import attempts on the same file.

Delegates the actual metadata extraction and persistence of each file to SongImportService. This class is responsible only for iterating the file list, invoking progress and completion callbacks, and classifying results as imported, skipped, or failed.

Skipped files are those that throw IllegalStateException, the convention used by SongImportService.importSong(java.io.File) when a song with the same file path already exists in the database.

  • Method Details

    • startImport

      public void startImport(List<File> files, ImportService.TriConsumer<Integer,Integer,String> onProgress, ImportService.TriConsumer<Integer,Integer,Integer> onComplete)
      Parameters:
      files - the list of music files to import
      onProgress - callback invoked per file with (currentIndex, total, fileName)
      onComplete - callback invoked once with (imported, skipped, failed) counts
